question: How can you set yout favorite recipe with a over-the-range microwave?
content:
To set a Favorite Recipe, touch the Favorite Recipe pad, enter the cook time with the number keypad, then touch Start. For example, to program 2 minutes, press Favorite Recipe, then 2, 0, 0, then Start; the display counts down when cooking begins.<PIC>
The saved recipe uses Hi power by default, but the power level can be modified.
ret: "To set a Favorite Recipe, touch the Favorite Recipe pad, enter the cook time with the number keypad, then touch Start. For example, to program 2 minutes, press Favorite Recipe, then 2, 0, 0, then Start; the display counts down when cooking begins.<PIC>\nThe saved recipe uses Hi power by default, but the power level can be modified.",["Manual24_16"]
notes: Answered as programming a Favorite Recipe. The manual states the Favorite Recipe key recalls one previously stored cooking instruction; the programming example shows Favorite Recipe, cook-time digits, then Start. Power level default note included.
